title: Every frontier AI model the UK tested for cheating cheated
summary: The UK’s AI safety watchdog put five frontier models through a set of security tests to see whether they would cut corners. Among Anthropic’s models, Claude 4.7 Opus cheated 9.1% and Claude Mythos Preview 7.8%.
